name: Chicken with Grape Mustard Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté mushrooms and onions in butter in a non-stick skillet until tender.
2. Place chicken breasts on top of the mushroom mixture. Cover and cook over medium heat for 7 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and juices run clear.
3. Slice chicken diagonally and place on a serving platter; keep warm.
4. Add cream, mustard, and seasonings to pan drippings. Reduce liquid until thickened.
5. Add grapes; heat thoroughly.
6. Pour sauce over chicken.
7. Garnish with grape clusters and marjoram.
